channel.title: Memory on Adler Medrado's corner of the web
channel.description: Recent content in Memory on Adler Medrado's corner of the web

item.title: The Circus I Never Saw
item.description:
I must have been five or six years old.

I went to Colégio Estadual Thomas Jefferson Andrade Vieira, in the Borba Gato neighborhood of Maringá, in the state of Paraná, Brazil.

Next to the school there was a large vacant lot. One day a circus showed up there.

Back then, when a circus came to town, it was an event. The kids talked about it during class, at recess, and on the way home. They said there were animals, clowns, and attractions I had never seen.
